name: U3O8 Corp.
summary: U3O8 Corp. focuses on the exploration, development, and evaluation of uranium properties in South America. It also explores for vanadium, nickel, zinc, phosphate, yttrium, neodymium, molybdenum, rhenium, silver, and other metals. The company's flagship property is the Berlin project that covers an area of approximately 12,665 hectares located in Caldas province of central Colombia. U3O8 Corp. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
